# Brian Isale — Portfolio

> Full Stack Developer, Creative Designer, and Community Builder based in Nakuru, Kenya.

Brian Isale (also known as BryanAim) is a software engineer and designer from Nakuru, Kenya.
He is a Google Africa Scholar (Andela, 2019) with 6+ years of professional experience.

## About

- **Full name:** Brian Isale
- **Known as:** BryanAim, Bryan Isale, Isale Brian
- **Location:** Nakuru, Kenya
- **Email:** isale.bryan@gmail.com
- **Website:** https://isalebryan.dev

## Professional Work

### Development
Brian builds modern web applications using Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js, Vue.js, Python/Django, WordPress, Tailwind CSS, and Google Cloud Platform. He has shipped 20+ projects and is an open-source contributor.

### Design
He creates brand identities, logos, motion graphics, UI/UX designs, and digital illustrations using Adobe Illustrator and Adobe Photoshop. His design portfolio is on Behance at https://behance.net/isalebryan

### Community
- Peer educator with HIV SEERs Kenya — fighting stigma through education and research
- Part of Unilever's Heroes for Change programme — reached 3,000+ youth across Nakuru
- Mentor to 20+ developers through Google Developer Groups and Andela alumni network

## Awards & Education

- Google Africa Scholarship — Mobile Web Specialist (Andela & Pluralsight, 2019)
